title: Autonomous loop scratch status in operator autocycle plan summary v0
problem: Ticket-339 surfaces autonomous_loop_scratch_status in operator plan mode and ticket-341 enriches the recommended-action reason, but operator autocycle plan/execute JSON does not yet pass through autonomous_loop_scratch_status for cycle visibility.
acceptance_criteria: Operator autocycle plan JSON includes autonomous_loop_scratch_status from build_operator_plan.
When scratch report exists, autocycle summary exposes research_quality_verdict and weakest_dimension.
No execute-safe command allowlist changes or queue writes.
rollback_plan: Revert autocycle plan field passthrough only.
